Mo To Compel Responses To Special Interrogs, And Request For Production Of Documents And Things
Off Calendar Apr-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories set #2 and request for production of documents set #1 is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $256.30 is to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
